title: Migration from Excel to monday sales CRM - lets talk about it :)

posts.author: elkemoshel (Elke Moshel)
posts.cookedHtml:
Migration from Excel - let’s talk about it

First of all, why is a CRM so much better than Excel? Well, there are multiple reasons, but the main one is that a CRM is MUCH more powerful

Using monday sales CRM, you and your team can automate repetitive and maul tasks, saving you so much time so you can focus on what matters - closing deals Another big advantage is the collaboration aspect - multiple users can work together and always be in the know, preventing information from slipping through the cracks.

So, let’s get stuck into it - how to do you migrate from your Excel into monday sales CRM? Check out the video below. I would love to know how you found/find the process etc.
